chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-313 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.2704/2016. 3. For hearing of M.A. No.9414/2016. 4. For hearing of M.A. No.3081/2021. 5. For orders on M.A. No.5128/2020. 6. For hearing of main case. 20.04.2021 Barrister Faizan Hussain Memon, Advocate for the petitioners. == Through M.A. No.3081 of 2021 duly supported by an affidavit of petitioner No.1 Ghulam Rasool Soomro, learned counsel the petitioners submits that petitioners want withdrawal of this petition due to non-pleading of some important facts seeking permission to file a fresh one on the same cause of action. As such, petition is dismissed as not pressed with permission to file fresh in accordance with the law. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
